steps.title: Identify the Metric for 'Better Explained'
steps.content: The passage defines “better explained methodology” through traceability—the rating for how clearly procedures are described.

steps.title: Apply the Metric to Challenge the Conclusion
steps.content: Choice A shows that Stobbe had lower traceability than Streicher-Porte, contradicting the conclusion that Stobbe's methodology was better explained. The other three either support the conclusion, lack comparative data, or measure a different dimension. That matches choice A — A is correct.
